_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Consider energy implications (graphical processing unit, tensor processing unit, etc.) when designing AI solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating AI use case feasibility, including data availability assessment, technical complexity estimation, and business value quantification.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-018 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.483), AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.479).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.355). Shared vocabulary: [ai]. DCWF-only terms [consider, designing, energy, etc, graphical, implications] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, availability, business, case, complexity, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.859, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (83.6%). "Consider energy implications (graphical processing unit, tensor processing unit," and "Skill in evaluating AI use case feasibility, including data availability assessm" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.496 > STS 0.355 (gap +0.141). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Shared tokens: [ai]. DCWF-only: [consider, designing, energy, etc, graphical, implications]. WIDAI-only: [assessment, availability, business, case, complexity, data].
